title: Smoky Mediterranean Wild Garlic Wrap
description: A charred, tender, one-pot Mediterranean dish featuring wild garlic leaves, wok-hei, and lacto-vegetarian-friendly ingredients, served in a lotus-leaf-wrap.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the wild garlic leaves and cook until they start to char, about 2 minutes.
Add the artichoke hearts, feta cheese, kalamata olives, and sun-dried tomatoes to the skillet.
Stir in the smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Cook for an additional 2 minutes, until the ingredients are well combined and the flavors have melded together.
Meanwhile, prepare the lotus leaves by rinsing them with water and patting them dry with paper towels.
To assemble the wraps, place a large spoonful of the Mediterranean mixture onto the center of a lotus leaf.
Fold the stem end over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the leaf into a tight cylinder.
Repeat with the remaining ingredients and serve immediately.
